evals.prompt: Design a slide layout for a developer training slide titled 'How LoRA Works' using an attached infographic-style reference.
evals.expected_output: A layout blueprint that extracts reference grammar, uses a technical infographic archetype, includes a 16:9 canvas contract, and specifies numbered zones, side rail, bottom band, semantic colors, and implementation notes.

evals.prompt: Review this technical deck because the layout feels boring and too card-heavy. Suggest a stronger layout system before rebuilding.
evals.expected_output: A review-mode response that identifies weak layout patterns, selects showcase slides, replaces generic grids with archetypes, and defines quality gates.

evals.prompt: Create layouts for an html-slides deck teaching developers QLoRA. Keep the content approved but make the visual system more impressive.
evals.expected_output: A slide-by-slide layout plan with CSS-friendly zones, visual protagonists, semantic color roles, text budgets, and overflow risks suitable for html-slides implementation.
